requiredShape: input.appspacetimeguid is required for worker-space direct calls
dataValues must be var[][] with typed variant cells
pal_assessment_record must use historical business-event record type 3106

previousFailures.causeFound: worker-space direct call did not include appspacetimeguid
dataValues cells were raw JS values instead of typed variant protobuf values

diagnosis.conclusion: The table is online and real Create/Query works. The failed path was using the wrong call context/parameter encoding, not a missing runtime object.
